summary: Tested all 7 features from the review request. All fixes verified working. Backend: 8/8 tests pass. Frontend: all UI checks pass.
critical_code_review_comments: The login response structure returns role at top-level (not inside a 'user' object) — this is noted for future test writers
Platform admin login does NOT use partner_code param — uses /api/auth/login without partner_code
PageLoader is inside BrowserRouter in App.tsx correctly so useLocation hook works
context_for_next_testing_agent: All 7 fixes verified: (1) Cart preview for platform_super_admin works - no 'Product not found' error; (2) Store search+sort are side-by-side at y=349 both; (3) Store pagination correctly absent with 1 product (totalPages > 1 condition); (4) Login page gateway and auth screen both use var(--aa-bg) CSS variable; (5) Partner signup page uses var(--aa-bg) CSS variable; (6) Admin sidebar items have hover:translate-x-0.5 class applied (28 items); (7) PageLoader element visible during navigation between pages. Platform admin login: POST /api/auth/login WITHOUT partner_code (partner_code is reserved and blocked). Cart fix was in backend/routes/store.py orders_preview endpoint (is_platform_admin fallback query). Backend test file at /app/backend/tests/test_iter277_fixes.py.

test_results.feature_1_cart_preview_platform_admin: PASS - Cart loads correctly with item 'Sample Service1' at £99.00, Order Summary shows total. No errors.
test_results.feature_2_store_search_sort_sidebyside: PASS - Both elements at y=349, x positions: search=1348, sort=1476. 0px Y difference.
test_results.feature_3_store_pagination: PASS - 1 product exists, no pagination shown (correct - only shows when totalPages > 1)
test_results.feature_4_login_page_bg: PASS - Gateway: style='background-color: var(--aa-bg); color: var(--aa-text)'. Auth screen same.
test_results.feature_5_signup_page_bg: PASS - Partner signup: style='background-color: var(--aa-bg); color: var(--aa-text)'
test_results.feature_6_admin_sidebar_hover: PASS - 28 sidebar items all have 'hover:translate-x-0.5 hover:bg-[var(--aa-surface)]' classes
test_results.feature_7_page_loader: PASS - PageLoader element found visible during navigation (fixed top progress bar)
